name: player_season_projected_pass_yds range year_offset re-scans projections_index with numeric week + seas_type discriminators
description: projections_index-backed projected stat (additive count, SUM is correct) with range year_offset=[1,2] re-scans projections_index pinned to sourceid=18, numeric week=0, seas_type=REG and year IN (2024,2025).
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(projections_index.py) FROM projections_index WHERE projections_index.pid = player.pid AND projections_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND projections_index.sourceid = 18 AND projections_index.week = 0 AND projections_index.seas_type = 'REG') AS "season_projected_pass_yds_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
